---
title: ""
format: html
---

# This website aims to be way to track progress and reinforce learning as i go

🔗 **[Logbook](log/index.qmd)** — Casual notes, ideas, and progress from daily work and study  
🔗 **[Blog](blog/index.qmd)** — Occasional deeper dives into tools, projects, or topics I’m exploring

---

# What I’m Working On

- Learning Bulk RNA-seq and eventually single-cell RNA-seq
- Studying machine learning with Python and scikit-learn

Thanks for visiting!
